basic.description: Defines the basic access level criteria, specifying conditions under which access is granted based on attributes such as device security status, IP subnet, or user identity.
basic.type: list(object({combining_function: optional(string),conditions: list(object({ip_subnetworks: optional(list(string)),members: optional(list(string)),negate: optional(bool),regions: optional(list(string)),required_access_levels: optional(list(string)),device_policy: list(object({allowed_device_management_levels: optional(list(string)),allowed_encryption_statuses: optional(list(string)),require_admin_approval: optional(bool),require_corp_owned: optional(bool),require_screen_lock: optional(bool),os_constraints: list(object({minimum_version: optional(string),os_type: string,require_verified_chrome_os: optional(bool)}))})),vpc_network_sources: list(object({vpc_subnetwork: list(object({network: string,vpc_ip_subnetworks: optional(list(string))}))}))}))}))

custom.description: Defines whether the access level is a custom access level or a predefined one. Must be set to true for custom access levels.
custom.type: list(object({expr: list(object({description: optional(string),expression: string,location: optional(string),title: optional(string)}))}))

description.description: Defines the details and purpose of the access level, supporting up to 256 characters.

name.description: Unique identifier for the access level, must be a string and comply with naming conventions.

parent.description: Specifies the parent resource in the format "accessPolicies/{policy_id}", under which the access level is created.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration for operations to complete before timing out, applicable to create, update, and delete actions.

title.description: Specifies the human-readable name for the access level, must be unique within the access policy.
